description: Returns [[true]] if Sling Load Assistant is open.
examples:
<sqf>
waitUntil { slingLoadAssistantShown };
hint "You lack rudimentary motor skills and basic eye-hand coordination."; // scold user for unethical practices
</sqf>
name: slingLoadAssistantShown

ret.desc: [[true]] if sling load assistant is shown, [[false]] otherwise
